scripts.build: npm run build -w @zenith/shared && npm run build -w @zenith/server && npm run build -w @zenith/web
scripts.build:demo: npm run build -w @zenith/shared && npm run build:demo -w @zenith/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @zenith/server && npm run test -w @zenith/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @zenith/server && npm run lint -w @zenith/web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w @zenith/server && npm run lint:fix -w @zenith/web
